final:
module reset_controller (
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg reset_state
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            reset_state <= 1'b1; // Reset state
        end else begin
            reset_state <= 1'b0; // Active state
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (rst_n) begin
        reset_state <= ~reset_state;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
